title: (Bee's) Serified Font
description: My take on a fancier Minecraft typeface
body: ### About 📚 This resource pack reworks the Minecraft font! My main intent was to make text feel more fantasy-esque and in line with the magical and medieval nature of the game! I think it's also a little bit more human and legible. It also makes use of semi-transparent pixels for anti-aliasing. I've never seen any resource pack do this in the font texture before, so the results of how that gets rendered on your screen may vary... Does not (yet) support diacritics/accents. I, err, delegated that work to future me... ### Compatibility You might get an in-game "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning if you're not playing on the latest version. You can freely ignore it if you're playing on a version the resource pack file is tagged with. Doesn't seem to always work well with mods, but at worst the font will look a bit different. Sometimes the semi-transparent pixels render themselves _and_ everything behind fully transparent... I don't know why. ### Collections Here are my other packs that go well with this one! - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
